exam_name: Praxis Subject Assessment: Elementary Education Math

testing_centers.notes: GRE General, TOEFL iBT, and Praxis exams available at Prometric centers worldwide. GRE Subject Tests are paper-based and available at fewer locations. TOEFL iBT and GRE General also available as at-home proctored exams.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required for all ETS exams. Name on ID must exactly match the name used during registration. A second form of ID may be required at some centers.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, books, or electronic devices permitted in the testing room. ETS ScoreSelect option available for GRE: choose which scores to send to institutions. For at-home GRE and TOEFL: must be alone in a quiet room, no second monitors, must use ETS-approved browser with lockdown software installed. Scratch paper provided at test centers; online whiteboard provided for at-home.
renewal_options: ETS exam scores are not certifications requiring renewal. GRE scores are valid for 5 years from the test date. TOEFL iBT scores are valid for 2 years from the test date. Candidates may retake exams to obtain more recent scores.

retake_policy.notes: GRE General: once every 21 days, maximum 5 times in any continuous rolling 12-month period. GRE Subject Tests: offered only 3 times per year (Sep, Oct, Apr); one attempt per administration. TOEFL iBT: once every 3 days; unlimited attempts. Praxis: retake policies vary by state; typically a 21-28 day waiting period after a failed attempt.

official_study_resources.title: Official GRE Super Power Pack
official_study_resources.notes: Includes 2 real, full-length practice tests. Free POWERPREP online practice tests also available.

official_study_resources.title: POWERPREP Online (GRE)
official_study_resources.notes: Two free full-length practice tests. Additional paid POWERPREP Plus tests available ($39.95 each).

official_study_resources.title: The Official Guide to the TOEFL iBT Test
official_study_resources.notes: Includes 8 full-length practice tests plus access to online tests.

official_study_resources.title: Praxis Interactive Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Official interactive practice available per test title at ets.org/praxis.

aliases: praxis subject assessment elementary education math
